mapper.select: SELECT trade_date, is_trading, remark FROM trade_calendar WHERE trade_date BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} ORDER BY trade_date
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO trade_calendar (trade_date, is_trading, remark) VALUES
(#{item.tradeDate}, #{item.isTrading}, #{item.remark})
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE is_trading = VALUES(is_trading), remark = VALUES(remark)
